languages.text: "Ваше благородство не знает границ, {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Мы бесконечно рады, что волей Императора и вашими усилиями еще одно Его дитя сегодня вернулось домой".

traits.locale_text: "Ваше благородство не знает границ, {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Мы бесконечно рады, что волей Императора и вашими усилиями еще одно Его дитя сегодня вернулось домой".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Your generosity is boundless, Heavenly Envoy. We rejoice that by the Emperor's divine will and your mighty efforts another child of His was safely returned home."
languages.original_text: "Ваше благородство не знает границ, {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Мы бесконечно рады, что волей Императора и вашими усилиями еще одно Его дитя сегодня вернулось домой".

traits.locale_text: "Your generosity is boundless, Heavenly Envoy. We rejoice that by the Emperor's divine will and your mighty efforts another child of His was safely returned home."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Your generosity is boundless, Heavenly Envoy. We rejoice that by the Emperor's divine will and your mighty efforts another child of His was safely returned home."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Your generosity is boundless, Heavenly Envoy. We rejoice that by the Emperor's divine will and your mighty efforts another child of His was safely returned home."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Eure Großzügigkeit ist grenzenlos, himmlischer Gesandter. Wir freuen uns, dass durch den göttlichen Willen des Kaisers und Eure mächtigen Bemühungen ein weiteres seiner Kinder sicher nach Hause zurückgekehrt ist."
languages.original_text: "Your generosity is boundless, Heavenly Envoy. We rejoice that by the Emperor's divine will and your mighty efforts another child of His was safely returned home."

languages.text: "Votre générosité est sans limite, Envoyé céleste. Nous nous réjouissons que, grâce à la volonté divine de l'Empereur et à vos efforts, un autre de ses enfants soit rentré chez lui sain et sauf."
languages.original_text: "Your generosity is boundless, Heavenly Envoy. We rejoice that by the Emperor's divine will and your mighty efforts another child of His was safely returned home."

languages.text: "您的慷慨无边，天国特使。我们为皇帝陛下的旨意和您的巨大努力而欢欣鼓舞 他的又一个孩子安全回家了。"
languages.original_text: "Your generosity is boundless, Heavenly Envoy. We rejoice that by the Emperor's divine will and your mighty efforts another child of His was safely returned home."

languages.text: "Tu generosidad no tiene límites, Enviado Celestial. Nos regocijamos de que por la divina voluntad del Emperador y tus poderosos esfuerzos otro hijo Suyo haya regresado a salvo a casa."
languages.original_text: "Your generosity is boundless, Heavenly Envoy. We rejoice that by the Emperor's divine will and your mighty efforts another child of His was safely returned home."

languages.text: 「天の使者よ、あなたの寛大さは無限です。皇帝の神意とあなたの力強い努力により、皇帝のもう一人の子供が無事に帰国したことを喜びます。"
languages.original_text: "Your generosity is boundless, Heavenly Envoy. We rejoice that by the Emperor's divine will and your mighty efforts another child of His was safely returned home."

languages.text: "Cömertliğiniz sınırsız, Cennet Elçisi. İmparator'un ilahi iradesi ve sizin kudretli çabalarınız sayesinde bir çocuğunun daha sağ salim evine dönmüş olmasından dolayı sevinçliyiz."
languages.original_text: "Your generosity is boundless, Heavenly Envoy. We rejoice that by the Emperor's divine will and your mighty efforts another child of His was safely returned home."
